schema.requested_structure_id: Structure ID the player asked /locate for; may contain a narrow wildcard only for grouped player reports.
schema.actual_structure_id_seen: Actual generated structure if a mod redirected or replaced the locate result.
schema.coordinates: Object with x/y/z if known, otherwise null.
schema.atlas_region: Atlas region from /ascatlas here if known.
schema.biome: Actual biome from /ascatlas here or debug screen if known.
schema.visual_issue_tags: Short tags such as water_island, region_fit_mismatch, looked_good, needs_followup.
schema.player_notes: Jayden's note or condensed exact field observation.
schema.decision: review decision; never a live override by itself.

observations.player_notes: Dragon roosts were reported spawning as islands in water like oceans or lakes.
